evals.prompt: Turn this blog post URL into a multi-file skill tree like rust-router. It should credit the author and should not route to unrelated existing skills.
evals.expected_output: Creates a self-contained skill tree with SKILL.md, source.md, architecture.md, local routed docs, examples, eval prompts, and source credit.

evals.prompt: I have a long PDF manual for an internal operational process. Build a skill tree from it with workflows, troubleshooting, examples, and verification checks.
evals.expected_output: Produces a document architecture suited to a PDF/manual source, including source inventory, workflows, troubleshooting docs, examples, and quality gates.

evals.prompt: This skill generated from a book is just a summary. Expand it into a real skill tree with local documents and practical routing.
evals.expected_output: Diagnoses thin-summary failure and restructures into principles, practices, workflows, examples, source notes, and evals without copying the book.
